keys.description: Keystrokes for kind=tmux-send-keys (e.g. 'C-c'). Empty/ignored for other kinds.

prompt.description: NATS subject the worker reads prompts from. Empty when the backend did not wire a prompt subject.

status.description: NATS subject the worker publishes status events to. Empty when not wired.

hb.description: NATS subject the worker publishes heartbeats to. Empty when not wired.

signal.description: NATS subject the worker reads control signals from. Empty when not wired.

spec_version.description: Wire contract version. Must be v2 for cmux/zmx executor values.

session.description: Echoes SpawnSpec.Session (or the resolved fallback). Empty if unset on both sides.

bus.description: Per-worker NATS subject map. Omit if the backend did not wire the bus.

abort.description: Imperative cancellation verb. Omit when imperative abort is not supported by the backend.

log_file.description: Path to the shim's startup log. Diagnostic only; empty when not produced.

pid.description: Worker process id when knowable. Best-effort; 0 when unknown.

message.description: Human-readable cause when status=failed; what we're waiting on when status=pending. Empty when status=ready.
